message:
chore: Update beads issue tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,10 +1,10 @@
 {"id":"bd-11c9","title":"Add bubbletea ReleaseTerminal/RestoreTerminal lifecycle methods","description":"Add Bubbletea lifecycle methods ReleaseTerminal/RestoreTerminal to mirror Go API.

Scope:
- Define public API methods on Program (and async variant if needed).
- Ensure terminal state transitions are safe (raw mode, alternate screen, cursor visibility).
- Integrate with existing lifecycle hooks and ensure idempotency.
- Add unit tests for state transitions and error handling.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- ReleaseTerminal and RestoreTerminal are exposed and documented.
- Unit tests verify terminal mode transitions and idempotent behavior.
- Conformance/integration tests updated if Go has fixtures for these lifecycle calls.","notes":"Files: crates/bubbletea/src/program.rs, crates/bubbletea/src/terminal.rs (if present), tests/conformance/crates/bubbletea/mod.rs.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-25T01:09:31.118149978Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:32:38.763706377Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T01:32:38.763653767Z","close_reason":"Implemented release_terminal() and restore_terminal() commands in bubbletea::screen. Added ReleaseTerminalMsg and RestoreTerminalMsg. Both sync and async event loops handle these messages to temporarily release/restore terminal control for subprocess execution.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
-{"id":"bd-15ay","title":"Add textarea word transformation operations (Capitalize, Uppercase, Lowercase, Transpose)","description":"Add textarea word transformation operations (Capitalize, Uppercase, Lowercase, Transpose) to match Go Huh behavior.

Scope:
- Implement word operations in textarea field logic (likely part of bd-212m.4.1 / bd-1o6y).
- Ensure operations respect cursor position and Unicode word boundaries.
- Add unit tests for each operation with edge cases.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- Word transform operations behave identically to Go (cursor position + selection).
- Unit tests cover ASCII and Unicode word boundaries.
- Conformance fixtures updated if Go has explicit tests for these ops.","notes":"Files: crates/huh/src/lib.rs (textarea editing helpers). Consider using unicode-segmentation for word boundaries.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-25T01:09:46.899949324Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T18:04:38.612427989Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

Consider using unicode-segmentation for word boundaries.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-25T01:09:46.899949324Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T18:10:24.270791587Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T18:10:24.270718109Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-18fb","title":"Fix unsafe cast truncation warnings in huh","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-19T23:40:57.335292220Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-19T23:41:12.676413650Z","closed_at":"2026-01-19T23:41:12.676362354Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-19di","title":"Draft CHARM_SPEC.md","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T17:00:30.815523532Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T17:10:23.806230979Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T17:10:23.806162170Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-1ajh","title":"Glamour table rendering conformance mismatch with Go reference","description":"23 of 84 glamour conformance tests fail due to table rendering differences between Rust and Go implementations. The Rust implementation renders tables with full rounded borders while the Go reference uses minimal borders. Example: Expected 'A | B -+ 1 | 2' but got full box drawing characters. Needs investigation to determine if we should match Go style or update fixtures.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-21T18:49:44.997000585Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T19:18:34.564909528Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T19:18:34.564860375Z","close_reason":"Fixed: 23 table conformance tests now passing. Added MINIMAL_BORDER for Go-compatible table rendering.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-1ant","title":"Add huh Form/Group state management and layout system","description":"Implement Huh Form/Group state management and layout system (core form orchestration).

Scope:
- Mirror Go Huh Form/Group model: groups of fields, navigation between groups, completion tracking, and layout metadata.
- Implement state machine for group navigation (next/prev, completion, required fields).
- Implement layout rendering for groups and field spacing.
- Update conformance fixtures for form navigation (nav_* fixtures) and add unit tests for state transitions.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- Form/Group navigation matches Go behavior for next/prev group transitions and completion rules.
- Unit tests cover group navigation, completion state, and layout decisions.
- Conformance tests for nav_* fixtures pass with no skips.","notes":"Files: crates/huh/src/lib.rs (Form, Group, Field), tests/conformance/crates/huh/mod.rs. Use legacy_huh form/group logic as reference.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-25T01:09:26.406966904Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:31:27.236603796Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T01:27:48.534011050Z","close_reason":"Implemented Layout trait with Default, Stack, Columns, Grid layouts. Enhanced Group with header(), footer(), content() methods. Added Form show_help/show_errors and help_view(). Added Theme.help style. All tests pass.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
-{"id":"bd-1gdn","title":"Add lipgloss individual border edge colors and Transform method","description":"Add per-edge border colors and Transform method to Lipgloss.

Scope:
- Extend border style API to set color per edge (top/right/bottom/left).
- Implement Transform method for style manipulation consistent with Go (e.g., normalize or mutate styles).
- Add unit tests for per-edge colors and Transform behavior.
- Update docs if API changes are user-visible.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- Per-edge border colors render correctly in multiple combinations.
- Transform method behaves as documented and has unit coverage.
- Conformance fixtures updated if needed to include per-edge color scenarios.","notes":"Files: crates/lipgloss/src/style.rs, border.rs, renderer.rs. Maintain backward compatibility where practical (but no shims).","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-25T01:09:48.923880193Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:32:36.962217263Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

Maintain backward compatibility where practical (but no shims).","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-25T01:09:48.923880193Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T18:10:41.637904676Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-1o6y","title":"Implement huh Multiselect, Text, FilePicker, Note field types","description":"Implement missing Huh field types: Multiselect, FilePicker, and Note. (Textarea is tracked separately under bd-212m.4.1.)

Scope:
- Add field structs + state for multiselect, filepicker, note in crates/huh/src/lib.rs.
- Implement update/view logic and keybindings consistent with Go.
- Add validation hooks and theming support for each field.
- Expand conformance fixtures and add unit tests for each field type.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- Conformance fixtures for multiselect, text, filepicker, and note pass with no skips.
- Unit tests cover input handling, selection toggles, and rendering for each field.
- FEATURE_PARITY.md updated to reflect field coverage.","notes":"Textarea scope moved to bd-212m.4.1 to keep parity gap tracking focused.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-25T01:09:22.524453153Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:33:37.237925265Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T01:19:31.436260994Z","close_reason":"Implemented Text and FilePicker fields. MultiSelect and Note were already present. All field types have builder pattern, validation, keyboard handling, theme support, and view rendering.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-1pdg","title":"Glow: truncate_string handles zero width","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T16:11:52.549379559Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T16:25:02.162307739Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T16:25:02.161950406Z","close_reason":"Completed: handle zero-width truncate_string; add tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-212m","title":"Parity closure plan (2026-01-25)","description":"Top-level parity closure plan from the latest conformance run (2026-01-25). This epic tracks infra reliability, crate-specific parity gaps, platform limitations, documentation completeness, and expanded conformance coverage. FEATURE_PARITY.md is the source of truth and must be updated after each significant change.

Current blockers from the latest run:
- benchmark_e2e::compilation_tests::test_benchmarks_compile fails (cargo cache lock + huh KeyMap file_picker initializer).
- Glamour has 18 skipped fixtures (lists, links, blockquotes, presets).
- Lipgloss has 1 skipped fixture (partial border edges).
- Huh has 4 skipped fixtures (textarea).
- Bubbletea custom I/O injection still noted as incomplete.
- README limitations require verification (Wish beta/Windows SSH, mouse drag, Unicode).

Scope: close all child epics and update FEATURE_PARITY.md with zero failures and no remaining parity skips except explicitly documented exclusions.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- All child epics/tasks are closed with tests passing.
- cargo test -p charmed_conformance completes with 0 failures; any remaining skips are explicitly justified in FEATURE_PARITY.md.
- FEATURE_PARITY.md and README limitations section reflect verified, current status.","notes":"Parent for all parity work. Use bead IDs as thread_id in agent mail. Do not delete or bypass conformance fixtures; update go_reference outputs when changing expected behavior.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:44:33.189244603Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:23:21.132511674Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
